title: wolfhsm crypto: AES (aes.rs)
description: AesKey{id:KeyId,bits:u32} with generate(bits), load(label,bits), commit, evict. Methods: gcm_encrypt(iv,aad,plaintext) -> (Vec<u8>,[u8;16]), gcm_decrypt(iv,aad,ciphertext,tag) -> Vec<u8> via wolfhsm_aes_gcm_* shims; cbc_encrypt(iv,plaintext), cbc_decrypt(iv,ciphertext), ctr(iv,data) via wh_Client_AesCbc*/wh_Client_AesCtr*. Implement aead::AeadInPlace for AesKey in GCM mode (nonce=IV, tag appended to ciphertext buffer).
